title: fire axe
description: replace basic minecraft axe with fire axe
body:
This resoursepack allows you to **rename** any axe to **"fire axe"** to replace its model with a beautiful fire axe.

![fire axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0dbfa4e87b943f26408c7ca3afd2588d2617c3f.png)

I also **strongly recommend** installing the **"RP renames"** mod, it greatly simplifies the use of my resource pack
